name: Brand Consistency Checker - AI-Powered Visual QC for Brand Guidelines

parameters.jsCode:
const body = $input.first().json.body;
return [{ json: {
  imageUrl: body.image_url || '',
  brandGuideId: body.brand_guide_id || 'default',
  referenceImages: body.reference_images || [],
  campaign: body.campaign || '',
  product: body.product || '',
  channel: body.channel || 'general',
  creator: body.creator || '',
  notifyChannel: body.notify_channel || '#brand-review',
  brandPalette: body.brand_palette || ['#000000', '#FFFFFF', '#C9A84C'],
  logoSpecs: body.logo_specs || { minSizeRatio: 5, maxSizeRatio: 15, position: 'bottom-center', clearSpace: 16 },
  passThreshold: body.pass_threshold || 70
}}];

parameters.command: convert /tmp/brand_check_image.jpg -resize 100x100! -depth 8 txt:- 2>/dev/null | tail -n +2 | awk '{print $3}' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn | head -10

values.content: You are a brand consistency auditor with expertise in visual identity and design systems. You analyze images against brand guidelines and provide detailed, actionable scoring.

Analyze this image for brand consistency. Score each category 0-100.

Brand Guidelines:
- Brand Palette: {{ $('Validate & Parse Input').first().json.brandPalette.join(', ') }}
- Logo Specs: min size {{ $('Validate & Parse Input').first().json.logoSpecs.minSizeRatio }}% of image, position {{ $('Validate & Parse Input').first().json.logoSpecs.position }}, clear space {{ $('Validate & Parse Input').first().json.logoSpecs.clearSpace }}px
- Channel: {{ $('Validate & Parse Input').first().json.channel }}
- Campaign: {{ $('Validate & Parse Input').first().json.campaign }}
- Product: {{ $('Validate & Parse Input').first().json.product }}

Dominant colors extracted: {{ $('Extract Dominant Colors').first().json.stdout }}

Return JSON with:
- palette_score, palette_notes
- logo_score, logo_notes
- typography_score, typography_notes
- composition_score, composition_notes
- style_score, style_notes
- artifact_score, artifact_notes
- technical_score, technical_notes
- overall_verdict: PASS or FAIL
- summary: 2-3 sentence assessment
- top_issues: array of critical issues

parameters.jsCode:
const analysis = JSON.parse($input.first().json.message.content);
const config = $('Validate & Parse Input').first().json;

const weights = {
  palette: 0.20,
  logo: 0.15,
  typography: 0.10,
  composition: 0.15,
  style: 0.20,
  artifact: 0.10,
  technical: 0.10
};

const overallScore = Math.round(
  (analysis.palette_score * weights.palette) +
  (analysis.logo_score * weights.logo) +
  (analysis.typography_score * weights.typography) +
  (analysis.composition_score * weights.composition) +
  (analysis.style_score * weights.style) +
  (analysis.artifact_score * weights.artifact) +
  (analysis.technical_score * weights.technical)
);

const verdict = overallScore >= config.passThreshold ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL';

return [{ json: {
  overallScore,
  verdict,
  paletteScore: analysis.palette_score,
  paletteNotes: analysis.palette_notes,
  logoScore: analysis.logo_score,
  logoNotes: analysis.logo_notes,
  typographyScore: analysis.typography_score,
  typographyNotes: analysis.typography_notes,
  compositionScore: analysis.composition_score,
  compositionNotes: analysis.composition_notes,
  styleScore: analysis.style_score,
  styleNotes: analysis.style_notes,
  artifactScore: analysis.artifact_score,
  artifactNotes: analysis.artifact_notes,
  technicalScore: analysis.technical_score,
  technicalNotes: analysis.technical_notes,
  summary: analysis.summary,
  topIssues: analysis.top_issues || [],
  campaign: config.campaign,
  product: config.product,
  channel: config.channel,
  creator: config.creator,
  imageUrl: config.imageUrl,
  checkedAt: new Date().toISOString()
}}];

parameters.text:
={{ $json.verdict === 'PASS' ? ':white_check_mark:' : ':x:' }} *Brand Check: {{ $json.verdict }}* (Score: {{ $json.overallScore }}/100)

:art: *{{ $json.campaign }}* — {{ $json.product }} ({{ $json.channel }})

:bar_chart: *Scores:*
• Color Palette: {{ $json.paletteScore }}/100
• Logo: {{ $json.logoScore }}/100
• Typography: {{ $json.typographyScore }}/100
• Composition: {{ $json.compositionScore }}/100
• Style Match: {{ $json.styleScore }}/100
• AI Artifacts: {{ $json.artifactScore }}/100
• Technical: {{ $json.technicalScore }}/100

{{ $json.topIssues.length > 0 ? ':memo: *Top Issues:*\n' + $json.topIssues.map(i => '• ' + i).join('\n') : '' }}

:speech_balloon: {{ $json.summary }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ verdict: $json.verdict, score: $json.overallScore, scores: { palette: $json.paletteScore, logo: $json.logoScore, typography: $json.typographyScore, composition: $json.compositionScore, style: $json.styleScore, artifacts: $json.artifactScore, technical: $json.technicalScore }, topIssues: $json.topIssues, summary: $json.summary }) }}
